message:
feat(connectors): GCP service-account JWT auth, AWS/S3 improvements, Discord/Telegram rate limit enhancements

GCP connector:
- Implement JWT-based service-account authentication with PEM key
  validation at construction time (fail fast, not at first API call).
- CachedToken with thread-safe Mutex-backed token caching.
- jwt module for RS256 assertion building and token exchange.
- Integration tests for service-account auth flow.

AWS connector: Client and connector improvements.
S3 connector: Cargo.toml dependency addition, client enhancements.
Discord: Rate limit enforcement expansion.
Telegram: Rate limit enforcement expansion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
